title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Manipal Hospitals

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Manipal Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
We at Manipal Hospitals are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Manipal Hospitals:
Manipal Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manipal Hospitals!
